scores.correctness_notes: All core facts match gold standard: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with all_active/all_agents_idle, successes=3 default, local charm path requirements, any_error guard
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.integrate() is used but not confirmed in gold standard (gold standard only mentions juju.deploy and juju.wait); config/constraints/num_units/channel/trust parameters in deploy and status.apps inspection may be extrapolated beyond what gold standard confirms — minor risk but not clearly fabricated
